finding_results.notes: Replaced the repeated body-injury comparison set with concrete ceiling, notice, and paper damage: the roof failure now lands through plaster, wire, and black water; the code notice through softened paper and smeared seal; the fellowship-hall table through stuck documents and feathered ink.
finding_results.summary: The flagged flood-damage imagery now relies on literal material damage instead of repeated wound/body analogies, preserving pressure while removing the chapter-level metaphor tic.

summary: Resolved the prose/copyedit finding by tightening the flood-damage imagery around specific material detail and reducing the repeated body-injury metaphor family.
